title: lygodium scandens var. microphyllum
intro: Lygodium scandens var. microphyllum, also known as the climbing fern or small-leaved climbing fern, is a variety of the climbing fern plant that is native to Australia and New Guinea. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Lygodium scandens var. microphyllum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
